let currentIndex = -1;
function toJsDelivr(url) { if (!url) return ''; return url.replace('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/', 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/') .replace('/refs/heads/master/', '@refs/heads/master/'); }
function renderGameList(filtered) { const container = document.getElementById('game-list'); container.innerHTML = ''; filtered.forEach((game, i) => { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'game-item'; if (i === currentIndex) div.classList.add('active'); div.innerHTML = `${game.title}`; div.onclick = () => loadGame(i, filtered); container.appendChild(div); }); }
function filterList() { const term = document.getElementById('search').value.toLowerCase(); const filtered = games.filter(g => g.title.toLowerCase().includes(term)); renderGameList(filtered); }
async function loadGame(index, list) { currentIndex = games.findIndex(g => g.title === list[index].title); const game = list[index]; document.getElementById('loading').style.display = 'flex'; const frame = document.getElementById('game-frame'); try { const res = await fetch(toJsDelivr(game.url) + "?t=" + Date.now()); if (res.ok) { const html = await res.text(); frame.srcdoc = html; } else { frame.src = toJsDelivr(game.url); } } catch(e) { frame.src = toJsDelivr(game.url); } document.getElementById('loading').style.display = 'none'; renderGameList(games); }
function toggleFullscreen() { if (!document.fullscreenElement) document.documentElement.requestFullscreen(); else document.exitFullscreen(); }
function exitToLibrary() { document.getElementById('game-frame').srcdoc = ''; }
window.onload = () => { renderGameList(games); loadGame(1, games); // Start with Geometry Dash };
